infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ProteinMate uses the microphone so you can log meals by voice.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ProteinMate uses the camera so you can log protein by photographing a product label.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ProteinMate reads a product label photo you choose to log its protein.
